_metadata.description: Segment profiles from hierarchical K-Means clustering

source_mapping.segments_0_to_4: ADS core recluster (subclusters of initial mixed cluster 0)

key_insights: Segment 0: Burst pattern - short tenure (59d) + high orders_per_year (mean 20.6, median 1) = skewed by few burst buyers
Segment 2: High-Cadence Lapsed - highest historical activity (18.7 orders/year) but now 84% dormant
Segment 4: 49.6% active (verified) - highest value segment, CRITICAL win-back priority
Segment 5: Long-tenure relationship cohort (1722d avg tenure, 40% active) - PROTECT
Segment 7: Archive tier - lowest value (median £789), lowest activity (10% active)

metric_notes.monetary_total: Displayed as MEDIAN by default to avoid outlier skew
metric_notes.recent_12m_revenue: Revenue from trailing 365 days from Oct 2024 snapshot. £0 for recency > 365
metric_notes.pct_active: Computed as % with recency_days <= 365, not segment-level assumption
metric_notes.orders_per_year: When mean >> median, distribution is skewed (few high-activity customers)

0.name: Early-Churn Burst
0.description: Short tenure (median 0d, mean 59d) with skewed activity pattern. Most are one-time buyers (orders_per_year median=1), but a subset had burst activity (mean=20.6). Suggests onboarding friction for the active subset.
recommended_actions: Automated friction-removal survey for recent churners
Address spec/MOQ/lead time concerns in messaging
Segment top 10% by value for personal outreach

1.name: Lapsed Regular
1.description: Previously regular customers (orders_per_year ~4-5) who stopped. 57% still active. Need diagnosis before discounting.

2.name: High-Cadence Lapsed
2.description: Highest historical activity (18.7 orders/year median) but now 84% dormant. Were highly engaged when active - worth win-back effort.

3.name: Project Re-quote
3.description: Higher AOV (median £2,877) with moderate order frequency (9.3/year). Project-based buying pattern - maintain awareness.

4.name: Win-back VIP
4.description: CRITICAL: Highest value (median £19,748, mean £91,587). 49.6% still active (verified). Executive-level tiered win-back required.
recommended_actions: Tiered offer ladder: Service fix → Commercial terms → Incentive
Account review meeting with senior leadership

5.name: Long-Tenure Relationship
5.description: Long-tenure cohort (1722d avg tenure). 40% active. Relationship-heavy segment - protect and grow.

6.name: Dormant Mid-Tenure
6.description: Mid-tenure (median 454d) with 84% now dormant. Worth moderate re-engagement effort.

7.name: Archive/Low-Touch
7.description: Lowest value (median £789), lowest activity (10% active). Archive tier - minimal investment only.
recommended_actions: Consider for archive after 2 no-response campaigns
